message:
style(mux): rustfmt import reordering across frankenterm/mux/src

Purely mechanical rustfmt output — no code changes, no functional
diff, no test changes. The diff is limited to two patterns:

1. Reordering items within `use` groups to the new rustfmt default
   (types after nested paths / functions, alphabetical within). E.g.
     - `use anyhow::{anyhow, bail, Context as _};`
       → `use anyhow::{Context as _, anyhow, bail};`
     - `use crossbeam::channel::{unbounded, Receiver, Sender};`
       → `use crossbeam::channel::{Receiver, Sender, unbounded};`
     - `use termwiz::cell::{unicode_column_width, CellAttributes};`
       → `use termwiz::cell::{CellAttributes, unicode_column_width};`

2. Reordering `use` statements themselves so nested `std::sync::*`
   blocks come after the bare `std::sync::Arc`, matching the new
   rustfmt group ordering. E.g.
     - `use std::sync::atomic::{AtomicUsize, Ordering};`
       `use std::sync::Arc;`
       → `use std::sync::Arc;`
         `use std::sync::atomic::{AtomicUsize, Ordering};`

3. Re-wrapping one `tab.rs` assertion so the `.is_none()` closer sits
   on its own line — again pure rustfmt output.

Files touched:
  frankenterm/mux/src/client.rs
  frankenterm/mux/src/connui.rs
  frankenterm/mux/src/domain.rs
  frankenterm/mux/src/events.rs
  frankenterm/mux/src/localpane.rs
  frankenterm/mux/src/pane.rs
  frankenterm/mux/src/ssh.rs
  frankenterm/mux/src/ssh_agent.rs
  frankenterm/mux/src/tab.rs
  frankenterm/mux/src/termwiztermtab.rs
  frankenterm/mux/src/tmux_pty.rs

The changes reflect `cargo fmt` run against the repo's current
rustfmt.toml (post import_granularity / reorder_imports updates).
Committing separately from the bead-tagged fixes so bisects against
any of ft-tzwuw / ft-t0gd0 / ft-trot7 don't land on an unrelated
whitespace commit.
